_comment: Plan 05.1-07. Flagship Power BI admin read-first ops. 12 aliases selected from the 285-op __powerbi__ catalog produced by plan 05.1-02.

rationale.__powerbi__Admin_GetActivityEvents: Tenant-wide activity audit is the primary compliance read for any Power BI admin assistant — baseline visibility.
rationale.__powerbi__Admin_GetCapacitiesAsAdmin: Premium capacity enumeration is required before any workload or scheduling op — flagship admin entry point.
rationale.__powerbi__Apps_GetAppsAsAdmin: Tenant-wide published-apps inventory; read-only admin discovery surface for governance tasks.
rationale.__powerbi__Groups_GetGroupsAsAdmin: Workspaces-as-admin enumeration; the cheapest single-shot grounding call for any admin workflow that scopes by workspace.
rationale.__powerbi__Datasets_GetDatasetsAsAdmin: Tenant-wide dataset inventory; prerequisite for lineage / refresh / capacity-binding read flows.
rationale.__powerbi__Reports_GetReportsAsAdmin: Tenant-wide report inventory; pairs with Datasets_GetDatasetsAsAdmin for content audit workflows.
rationale.__powerbi__Dashboards_GetDashboardsAsAdm: Tenant-wide dashboard inventory; completes the content-type triad (datasets + reports + dashboards).
rationale.__powerbi__Dataflows_GetDataflowsAsAdmin: Dataflow inventory for lineage-aware admin flows; required before any lineage-scoped drill-down.
rationale.__powerbi__Capacities_GetCapacities: Non-admin capacity enumeration (delegated scope); surfaces caller-visible capacities for self-service workflows.
rationale.__powerbi__Gateways_GetGateways: Gateway enumeration; prerequisite for any on-premises datasource configuration workflow.
rationale.__powerbi__Pipelines_GetPipelinesAsAdmin: Deployment-pipeline inventory; tenant-wide view for release-governance flows.
rationale.__powerbi__Groups_GetGroups: Delegated-scope workspace enumeration; mirrors Admin_GetGroupsAsAdmin for non-admin callers.
